prompt: Trace the early history of the Silverton Newspaper Archive in Silverton. First identify its authoritative custodian, then fetch an official accession note or institutional history that states where the collection was originally housed. Do not confuse the founding site with its current address. Verify only the original location; do not research the current address or speculate about why the collection moved.

fetch_primary.title: Silverton Newspaper Archive accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Silverton Newspaper Archive began in the compositor's room of the former Silver Star offices. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.
